entries.pattern: Capacity residual becomes persistently negative with low-curvature monotone fade.
entries.regime_scope: Single-cell, capacity-only, cycle-aging traces under fixed interpretation thresholds.
entries.admissibility_assumptions: Capacity channel available; no claim of mechanism uniqueness; production path remains read-only and advisory.
entries.uncertainty_notes: Illustrative heuristic only; transfer across chemistries or observers is not claimed here.

entries.pattern: Capacity drift remains outward while negative slew persists long enough to satisfy the acceleration rule.
entries.regime_scope: Single-cell, capacity-only helper narratives under the current drift and slew persistence settings.
entries.admissibility_assumptions: Acceleration message is structural and rule-based rather than a mechanism identification claim.
entries.uncertainty_notes: This entry does not identify lithium plating or any unique physical cause.
